problems_encountered.description: Tool requires inviteId parameter which would come from org/invite/list, which itself cannot be executed due to missing organization IDs from org/list.
Tool would perform destructive operation (revoke invitation) on production data

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed - missing prerequisite invite ID and would modify production data
execution_notes: This tool requires: (1) valid inviteId from org/invite/list (unavailable due to org/list ID issue), (2) confirmation flag, (3) appropriate permissions. Executing would revoke actual invitations in production environment.
